title: Dr. Swift's Answer (Epigram On The Busts)
content:
Her majesty never shall be my exalter;
    And yet she would raise me, I know, by a halter!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Jonathan Swift, titled "Dr. Swift's Answer (Epigram On The Busts)", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
